pairs.label: MRI — who reads it matters
pairs.learning: On-screen hooks that stress who reads the MRI (not just having a scan) outperform generic MRI pain hooks.
pairs.hook_pattern: Competence-gap fear + named stakeholder (who reads it)

pairs.label: Excision vs ablation — hook packaging
pairs.learning: Same excision vs ablation script; packaging with explicit 'ask for excision' hook vs analogy-first hook shifts saves and views.
pairs.hook_pattern: Direct surgical ask vs analogy opener
